conbody.p: Amazon Elastic Beanstalk is a service from AWS that helps you easily deploy and manage web applications. You just upload your code, and the deployment part is handled by Elastic Beanstalk (from capacity provisioning, load balancing, and auto-scaling to application health monitoring).

ul.li: Supports Java, Python, Node.js, .NET, PHP, Ruby, Go, and Docker.
Handles provisioning, load balancing, autoscaling, and monitoring.

p.note: Use Case: Deploy a Django application via ZIP upload.
